description: A new order has a shipping address that cannot be verified by the shipping software. An agent must contact the customer to correct it.

nodes.task_description: The system flags an order with an unverifiable address.

expected_outcome.value: The order is placed on hold.

nodes.task_description: Contact the customer to confirm the correct shipping address.

expected_outcome.value: Agent calls the customer and gets the corrected address.

nodes.task_description: Update the address on the order and release it from hold.

expected_outcome.value: Agent corrects the address, and the order proceeds to fulfillment.
